---
title: "Politico Pro"
page-layout: article
---

# Politico Pro

## Description

Policy intelligence platform covering legislative, regulatory, and political developments, including energy and environment news. Supports government, policy, and advocacy research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Government & Public Policy, GIS & Spatial Data
- **Data/resource type:** News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics, Geospatial & Mapping Data
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics, Geospatial & Mapping Data

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb2498)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
